prestazioni: Engine: 2.0L TFSI (EA888 Gen 3, **CZGB** engine code) with a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) running 2.2 bar (32 psi) boost on E85 fuel, paired with a **Mahle Motorsport forged piston kit** (9.5:1 compression) and **Manley Turbo Tuff+ H-beam connecting rods** for 550+ hp at the crank.

Drivetrain: **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ clutch kit** (multi-plate sintered bronze) with a **South Bend billet flywheel** to handle the torque, mated to a **Quattro GmbH RS4-spec rear differential** (40% lockup under load) and **Audi Sport DTM-spec half-shafts** with upgraded CV joints.

Suspension & Handling: **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 24-position rebound, 15-position compression) with **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars**, **Audi Sport DTM-spec subframe reinforcements**, and **Brembo GT 380mm 6-piston front / 355mm 4-piston rear brake kit** (two-piece rotors, Pagid RS29 pads) for endurance-level stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with **custom DTM-style side skirts** (hand-laid fiberglass, 50mm wider than OEM) and a **carbon fiber hood** (vented, 3kg lighter than OEM) from **Seibon Carbon**.

**Audi Sport DTM Edition-spec livery** (vinyl wrap in **Audi Nardo Gray** with **Motul Racing Blue** accents, **OMP DTM-style door numbers**, and **Sabelt 6-point harnesses** visible through the rear side windows).

**OZ Racing Superleggera HLT wheels** (9x19 ET30 front, 10.5x19 ET35 rear) in **Gunmetal finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear) with **H&R spacers** (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment.
